mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistically significant positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals deteriorating labor market conditions that immediately suppress equity valuations over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of instances where UNRATE rises above the 0.2pp threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansions in retail sales and housing starts indicate robust consumer demand that drives corporate earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint positive deviation of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns with a Rank IC above 0.05 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect strengthening manufacturing output that supports equity valuations and generates positive 20-day returns exclusively during periods of stable inflation.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to predict positive 20-day returns when CPIAUCSL growth exceeds 3% annually, or the signal loses predictive power in high-inflation regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly real GDP growth signals stronger macroeconomic fundamentals that translate into immediate positive market sentiment and positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show zero or negative correlation with 5-day forward returns across all tested rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: When consumer price index growth exceeds 2.5% annually, anticipated monetary tightening compresses equity multiples and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 60-day returns in over 60% of periods where CPIAUCSL growth surpasses the 2.5% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in total nonfarm payrolls and decreases in the unemployment rate confirm a healthy labor market expansion that drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined PAYEMS and UNRATE signal fails to produce a positive Rank IC over 20-day horizons during mid-cycle periods.

mechanism_narrative: Declines in retail sales indicate weakening consumer spending that triggers negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days exclusively during late-cycle economic phases.
failure_condition: RSAFS declines do not predict negative 5-day returns specifically in late-cycle regimes, or the signal performs identically across all cycle phases.
